channel.title: Happiness on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Happiness on PepsFeeder

item.title: Express your love for yourself and take care of your mental and emotional health
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Mental and emotional health should not be confused with happiness and usually maintaining a good mood, because strong mental health does not guarantee you to be happy.

item.title: The Science of Happiness: Wealth, Geography, Culture, and the Limits of Self-Help
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Are rich people happier than other people? A study conducted in the Netherlands said that there is a positive relationship between wealth and contentment in life, and this is not surprising.
